displayNameZh: 报告从评分改成建议怎么开始做
summary: Yt Report Transform component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「报告从评分改成建议怎么开始做」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-report-transform/src/YtReportTransform.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtReportTransform` and `ytReportTransformDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Report Transform Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-report-transform to my project. Preserve the exported YtReportTransformProps API and register the YtReportTransform composition with the default props.
